title: Aadi Krithigai
text:
Celebrate Aadfi Krithigai with us on <b>August 6th & 7th<b>. Main Utsavam on <b>Tursday, August 7th<b>

<b>Aadi Bharani Nakshatra<b>: Begins on Wednesday, August 5 at 9:18 PM and ends on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM.

<b>Aadi Krithigai Nakshatra<b>: Begins on Thursday, August 6 at 8:13 PM and ends on Friday, August 7 at 6:43 PM.

<b>Krittika Nakshatra<b> enters on the evening of Thursday, August 6th, it remains active through sunrise (Udaya Nakshatra) and prevails for almost the entire day of <b>Friday, August 7th<b>.
